checklist.check_deps_rules: Enforce strict `DEPS` file compliance to prevent circular dependencies or violating architectural layering.
checklist.check_includes: Prevent `#include` bloat. Suggest forward declarations where possible to improve compilation time and binary size.
checklist.check_gn_targets: Enforce proper GN target boundaries, visibility, and dependencies (e.g., `public_deps` vs `deps`).
